label: Accessibility
items: Every interactive element now shows a clear focus ring when you reach it with the keyboard.
We now honour your OS-level Reduce Motion preference — animations and transitions stay still for users who need them to.

label: Admin & Diagnostics
items: Audit Log: export your AI usage history to CSV for offline analysis.
Audit Log: new banner projects your monthly AI spend based on the current run-rate.
A subtle amber dot appears on your avatar when a new release ships, with a 'What's new' shortcut in the profile menu.

label: Beta Feedback
items: Quick 👍 / 👎 buttons let you send a one-tap reaction without typing anything.
Detailed star ratings and written feedback are still available below the shortcut.

label: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed dashboard sub-tab navigation — clicking the Dashboard tab from Locations / Calendar / Weather now correctly returns you to the default view.
